source_commit_note: Dispatch should go to remote evaluator eval-daemon-b7c2d9c80c1c after this proposal and generator support are merged.

requested_items.objective: Sweep HBM pJ/byte over retained quality-backed Llama7B attention frontier rows and report whether throughput-best, energy-best, and balanced points differ.

expected_result.reason: Expose sensitivity to the dominant HBM pJ/byte energy term before claiming an energy-optimal Llama7B attention point.

requested_items.notes: This request must run on remote evaluator eval-daemon-b7c2d9c80c1c. Merged via PR #973 and merge 90c7946a1ffdcc9265bcb5ba794199372097b5ba at 2026-06-22T08:35:16.205792Z.
